name: @gonext/plugin-frontend-host
description: Frontend-host hardening for plugin-contributed JavaScript in the GoNext admin. Provides a Trusted Types policy (`gn-plugin`), Subresource Integrity (SRI) helpers, an allowlisted import-map generator, and a React <PluginScript> component that emits SRI-checked script tags inside the import-map sandbox. Pairs with packages/go/middleware/csp so plugin JS in the admin runs under the strictest CSP shape the platform supports. Apache-2.0.

scripts.build: echo '@gonext/plugin-frontend-host: source-only package, no build step'
